news.title: UChicago Medicine to study impact of Formula 1 racing season on performance
news.summary_en: Partnership with TGR Haas F1 Team will examine physical, cognitive and psychological toll of motorsports

news.title: As Chicago's sports teams angle for new deals, students offer a playbook
news.summary_en: Winning team in Harris Policy Innovation Challenge at UChicago proposed sweeping overhaul of how the city handles stadium deals with pro sports franchises
